title: centranthus calcitrapae subsp. orbiculatus
intro: Centranthus calcitrapae subsp. orbiculatus, also known as the Valerian Plumeless or Jersey Button, is a plant species in the valerian family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Centranthus calcitrapae subsp. orbiculatus include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Centranulus calcitrapae subsp. orbiculatus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
